response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates extensive experience in fullstack development with a strong focus on TypeScript, React, and databases (MongoDB, SQL), along with expertise in scalable architectures (micro-services, Kubernetes, AWS). His background aligns well with the role's requirements, including energy/geospatial projects and AI-agent infrastructure. While his experience leans toward senior roles, his adaptability and depth of knowledge suggest he could thrive in this junior/mid-level position.
strengths: Strong fullstack expertise with TypeScript, React, and Nest.js (or equivalent frameworks)
Proven scalability experience with micro-services, Kubernetes, and AWS (ECS, RDS, etc.)
Hands-on experience with relational/NoSQL databases (PostgreSQL, MongoDB) and clean architecture
concerns: Overqualified for entry-level role (10+ years of senior experience may lead to role mismatch)
Limited direct exposure to PostgreSQL compared to MongoDB/SQL (though adaptable)
High on-site presence requirement may conflict with his current roles (hybrid/remote-heavy experience)
